description: Purely combinational opcode decoder for RISC-V single-cycle CPU that decodes 7-bit opcode field to determine instruction format and generate coarse control signals for R-type, I-type (ALU/load/JALR), S-type, B-type, U-type (LUI), and J-type (JAL) instructions.
dse_strategies: Strategy 1: Parallel comparator approach using eight independent 7-bit equality comparators for each opcode pattern, optimized for minimum latency at the cost of area (8 comparators)
Strategy 2: Binary decision tree decoder using cascaded if-else or case statements to minimize logic depth by checking most frequent opcodes first, balancing area and delay
Strategy 3: ROM-based lookup table using opcode as address index into 128-entry table, trading off area for regular structure and potential power optimization through address decoding
golden_model_python:
def generate_test_vectors():
    import random
    test_vectors = []
    
    # Hardcode edge cases for all valid RISC-V opcodes
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b0110011})  # R-type
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b0010011})  # I-type ALU
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b0000011})  # I-type load
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b0100011})  # S-type
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b1100011})  # B-type
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b0110111})  # U-type LUI
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b1101111})  # J-type JAL
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b1100111})  # I-type JALR
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b0000000})  # Invalid opcode
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b1111111})  # Invalid opcode
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b0101010})  # Invalid opcode
    test_vectors.append({'opcode': 0b1010101})  # Invalid opcode
    
    # Generate random test vectors
    for _ in range(88):
        test_vectors.append({'opcode': random.randint(0, 127)})
    
    return test_vectors

def golden_model(model_state, inputs):
    expected_output = {}
    
    opcode = inputs.get('opcode', 0) & 0x7F
    
    # Initialize all outputs to 0
    expected_output['is_r_type'] = 0
    expected_output['is_i_type_alu'] = 0
    expected_output['is_i_type_load'] = 0
    expected_output['is_s_type'] = 0
    expected_output['is_b_type'] = 0
    expected_output['is_u_type_lui'] = 0
    expected_output['is_j_type_jal'] = 0
    expected_output['is_i_type_jalr'] = 0
    
    # Decode opcode
    if opcode == 0b0110011:  # 0x33
        expected_output['is_r_type'] = 1
    elif opcode == 0b0010011:  # 0x13
        expected_output['is_i_type_alu'] = 1
    elif opcode == 0b0000011:  # 0x03
        expected_output['is_i_type_load'] = 1
    elif opcode == 0b0100011:  # 0x23
        expected_output['is_s_type'] = 1
    elif opcode == 0b1100011:  # 0x63
        expected_output['is_b_type'] = 1
    elif opcode == 0b0110111:  # 0x37
        expected_output['is_u_type_lui'] = 1
    elif opcode == 0b1101111:  # 0x6F
        expected_output['is_j_type_jal'] = 1
    elif opcode == 0b1100111:  # 0x67
        expected_output['is_i_type_jalr'] = 1
    
    return model_state, expected_output
